mapper.select: SELECT product_id, product_name, description, is_best, img_url, price, quick_rundown, category_id, created_at, updated_at, category_detail_id FROM product_tb ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT product_id, product_name, description, is_best, img_url, price, quick_rundown, category_id, created_at, updated_at, category_detail_id FROM product_tb WHERE product_id = #{productId}

SELECT product_id, product_name, description, is_best, img_url, price, quick_rundown, category_id, created_at, updated_at, category_detail_id FROM product_tb WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT product_id, product_name, description, is_best, img_url, price, quick_rundown, category_id, created_at, updated_at, category_detail_id FROM product_tb WHERE category_detail_id = #{categoryDetailId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_tb (product_name, description, is_best, price, category_id, category_detail_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{productName}, #{description}, 0, #{price}, #{categoryId}, #{categoryDetailId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE product_tb SET product_name = #{productName}, description = #{description}, is_best = #{best}, img_url = #{imgUrl}, price = #{price}, quick_rundown = #{quickRundown}, category_id = #{categoryId}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, category_detail_id = #{categoryDetailId} WHERE product_id = #{productId}
mapper.select: SELECT p.product_id, p.category_id, p.category_detail_id, p.product_name, p.description, p.is_best AS best, p.price, p.quick_rundown, p.created_at, p.updated_at, t.product_thumnail_id, t.product_url FROM product_tb p LEFT JOIN product_thumbnail_tb t ON p.product_id = t.product_id WHERE p.is_best = 1 ORDER BY p.created_at DESC

SELECT p.product_id, p.category_id, p.category_detail_id, p.product_name, p.description, p.best, p.price, p.quick_rundown, p.created_at, p.updated_at, t.product_thumnail_id, t.product_url FROM product_tb p LEFT JOIN product_thumbnail_tb t ON p.product_id = t.product_id WHERE p.product_id = #{productId}
